name: should create a query with fantasy points from seasonlogs
description: Test case for should create a query with fantasy points from seasonlogs
expected_query: select "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."points" AS "points_from_seasonlogs_0", "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."points_per_game" AS "points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0", "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."points_rnk" AS "points_rnk_from_seasonlogs_0", "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."points_pos_rnk" AS "points_pos_rnk_from_seasonlogs_0", "player"."primary_position" from "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."pid" where "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' and "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."year" = 2022 group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."points", "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."points_per_game", "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."points_rnk", "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."points_pos_rnk", "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "tee00e671538393408c797cda707dfd30"."pid" asc limit 500
